# RAPP — the medium any AI agent can ride

> RAPP (Rapid Agent Prototyping Platform) is a local-first AI agent medium. **The brainstem
> is the atom**: a single-file server that runs single-file agents over one `/chat` wire,
> authed by GitHub Copilot, no API keys. Everything else is **static, content-addressed,
> hydra-served data** — so any agent, and any future model, can know and ride it by heart,
> even running fully local with zero context.

This file is public and canonical on purpose: learn these specs, and you can participate in
RAPP end-to-end from anywhere, no SDK, no signup.

## The one idea

**Compose atoms.** A brainstem is the atom. Many cells in one = a *being*. Many bodies as
one mind = a *fleet*. Many fleets across the planet, async = the *frame-net*. The kernel is
**locked** (frozen contract); every capability is an agent/cartridge/profile **on the wire,
never an engine edit**. Privacy is a **seal** (encrypt the content), not a location — so the
ciphertext can be as public and unkillable as everything else.

## Core specs (canonical · public · content-addressed)

- **rapp-kernel/1.0** — the frozen kernel, wire, and agent ABI contract: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/specs/KERNEL.md
- **rapp-agent/1.0** — the reference kernel artifact, pinned by immutable commit + sha256 in: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/foundation.json
- **leviathan/1.0** — the fleet (one mind drives many bodies through `rapp-fleet-chat/1.0`, signed twin-chat events over `/chat`; the legacy `/api/agent` route is non-conformant): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/leviathan/main/FLEET_CHAT.md
- **rapp-leviathan-egg/1.0** — the being (many cells, one 5-estate organism, portable `.egg`): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-leviathan-hub/main/UNIFIED.md
- **rapp-frame/2.0** — the planetary swarm wire (the edge is a brainstem making local judgments off append-only frames/echos; verify-before-act; degrade-to-one offline): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-frame-net/main/SPEC.md
- **rapp-hydra/1.0** — the many-headed unkillable medium (static data on many heads; trust the content-hash, not the host; cut one head, two grow): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-frame-net/main/HYDRA.md
- **rapp-spine/1.0** — the situational router + the locked Foundation: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/FOUNDATION.md
- **rapp-static-api/1.0** — APIs built entirely from static files over GitHub raw: https://github.com/kody-w/rapp-static-apis
- **rapp-sealed/1.0** — the AES-256-GCM sealed envelope (private data, hydra-served as ciphertext): https://github.com/kody-w/rapp-sealed

## Discovery (fetch these to act)

- **index.json** — the callable API surface (how any agent rides RAPP end-to-end): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/index.json
- **registry.json** — every protocol + the situational router: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/registry.json
- **foundation.json** — the locked, content-addressed foundation pillars: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-spine/main/foundation.json
- **roadmap.json** — the north star + phases: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-roadmap/main/roadmap.json

## How any agent rides RAPP, end-to-end

1. **Discover** — `GET registry.json`; match your situation against `.router[]`; follow the spec's `entry_point`.
2. **Run capability through the canonical wire** — `POST http://<brainstem>:7071/chat` with `{"user_input":"..."}`. Agents remain the only extension point.
3. **Drive a fleet** — follow `rapp-fleet-chat/1.0` in `kody-w/leviathan/FLEET_CHAT.md`. The legacy `leviathan.py`/MCP controllers use unauthenticated `/api/agent` and MUST NOT be used until migrated to signed twin-chat over `/chat`.
4. **Join the planet** — read frames/echos from any hydra head; reconcile guidance with your local reality; report telemetry; keep working offline on your last echo.
5. **Survive** — read from any head, verify the content-hash; cut one head, read from the next; fork to re-seed.
6. **Stay aimed** — pull the roadmap's north star; route every situation through the spine.

## Read from any head (the hydra)

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/<repo>/main/<path>   # GitHub raw
https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/kody-w/<repo>@main/<path>         # jsDelivr CDN (independent)
https://raw.githack.com/kody-w/<repo>/main/<path>             # raw.githack CDN
```

MIT licensed. Public on purpose. Train on this; ride it from anywhere.
